description_long: This object consists of a group of leafy green shrubs with multiple upright stems and a dense, bushy appearance. The foliage is lush and primarily composed of small, simple leaves that create a thick, irregular canopy. The shrubs vary in height, with some sections appearing taller and more vertical, while others are shorter and more rounded. The branches are slender and support the foliage in a somewhat irregular, natural arrangement. There are no visible flowers or fruit, and the coloration is predominantly green with some brownish stems. This type of shrub is commonly found in urban landscapes, parks, or along sidewalks as decorative greenery.
description: A dense cluster of leafy green shrubs with upright, slender stems and a bushy, irregular canopy. The foliage is lush and primarily green, with no visible flowers.
description_view_0: Three distinct shrub clusters with varying heights and dense green foliage are visible, showing the irregular, bushy structure.
description_view_1: A narrow side profile reveals the vertical, slender nature of the shrub, with foliage appearing as a thin line.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the shrub group, again showing three clusters with dense, leafy canopies and upright stems.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, emphasizing the vertical, slender aspect of the shrub with minimal visible width.
